subject: A large one-eyed giant (cyclops) charging through flame and rubble while smaller figures with fire magic scatter before it
description: A massive, shirtless one-eyed giant dominates the upper-right of the frame, charging forward through a scene of fire and debris. Its single eye is prominent, body blood-marked, fists raised. In the lower-left foreground, two smaller humanoid figures — one crouching with a fire-conjuring weapon, one leaping away — scramble to avoid the giant's advance. Flames and rolling boulders occupy the lower quarter of the image. The scale differential between giant and smaller figures is the central visual tension. Dust and fire smoke fill the air.
foreground: Cyclops charging, two smaller figures fleeing amid fire and rocks
emotion: raw aggression from the giant; panic and urgency from the smaller figures
